text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 189 

If positions 3 and 4 of the provider number are both alpha characters, shown on the list below, then 
populate positions 3 and 4 of this field with the following numeric values: 

Rehab/Psych Unit of LTCH: 

If “TA” or “SA”, populate “20” 

If “TB” or “SB”, populate “21” 

If “TC” or “SC”, populate “22” 

Psych Unit of Rehab Facility: 

If “SD”, populate, “30” 

Rehab/Psych Unit of Hospital:
